compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add agent separation enforcement to Step 6 with exemptions
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Modify Step 6 in plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md:
- Add HARD-GATE requiring root_cause_report input from prior sub-agent Task tool call
- Orchestrating agent may not produce root_cause_report itself
- Add explicit exemption block for mechanical fix path (syntax, import, lint, config errors)
- Add explicit exemption block for bot-psychologist path
- Define behavioral/mechanical classification boundary

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Task b443-4534 tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-agent-separation.sh
- [ ] Step 6 contains root_cause_report
  Verify: grep -q 'root_cause_report' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Step 6 contains HARD-GATE language
  Verify: grep -q 'HARD-GATE' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Exemption text for mechanical and bot-psychologist
  Verify: grep -qi 'mechanical.*exempt\|exempt.*mechanical' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md && grep -qi 'bot.psychologist.*exempt\|exempt.*bot.psychologist' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
